fields.title: How Givit Is Helping Communities in Lagos
fields.excerpt: Givit connects donors with people in need by allowing unused items to be shared instead of wasted.
fields.content:
Givit is a community-driven platform designed to connect people who have unused items with those who truly need them. Every day, valuable items like clothes, books, and electronics are thrown away while many individuals struggle to access them.

Through Givit, users can upload items they no longer need and make them available for others to request. This helps reduce waste, support low-income families, and build a stronger sense of community.

Our mission is simple: don’t waste it, give it.
